title: is_simple_space_prop and Phase 2 extraction must be kept in sync manually
description: Adding a new simple Space property (e.g. 'icon') requires updating is_simple_space_prop AND patch_map.get('icon') in Phase 2. Missing the first step causes the new field to fall into validate_member_patch, which rejects it as invalidPatch — a confusing failure mode. The comment on is_simple_space_prop documents this, but it is still a footgun. Fix: refactor Phase 2 to extract simple props from the return value of is_simple_space_prop so the two paths share a single definition.
